headline: W. R. Berkley Corporation Names R. Christopher DeLauder President of Berkley Environmental
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., April 23, 2026--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) today announced the appointment of R. Christopher DeLauder as president of Berkley Environmental. He succeeds Kenneth J. Berger, who has been named chair of the business. The appointments are effective immediately.

headline: Globe Life Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Rise Y/Y on Higher Premiums
summary: Globe Life's Q1 earnings miss estimates despite higher premiums and underwriting gains, as rising expenses weigh on results.

headline: RLI Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Investment Income Increases Y/Y
summary: RLI misses Q1 estimates as catastrophe losses weigh on underwriting, though investment income and casualty growth help offset pressure.

headline: BMO Capital Upgrades W. R. Berkley (WRB)
Selective Insurance Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: SIGI's Q1 earnings miss estimates as catastrophe losses and weak underwriting hit profits, despite strong investment income and modest revenue growth.

headline: This Texas Instruments Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 4 Upgrades For Thursday
summary: Wall Street analysts upgraded WRB, TXN, TFIN and MUSA stocks and raised price targets. Check out other analysts' views and ratings on TXN.

headline: WRB Q1 Deep Dive: Competition Rises as Cycle Shifts, Capital Returns Remain a Focus
summary: Property casualty insurer W. R. Berkley (NYSE:WRB) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 4% year on year to $3.69 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.30 per share was 14.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: BMO Capital Upgrades WR Berkley to Market Perform, Raises Price Target to $68
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Michael Zaremski   upgrades WR Berkley (NYSE:WRB) from Underperform to Market Perform and raises the price target from $64 to $68.
